metadata.name: Investigate Cause of Widespread Air Quality Alert

description: A sudden, city-wide drop in air quality is detected. An operator must investigate the cause, suspecting a regional event like a wildfire.

nodes.task_description: Acknowledge simultaneous 'Poor Air Quality' alerts from sensors across the entire city.

expected_outcome.value: Agent recognizes the event is widespread, not localized.

nodes.task_description: Query external data sources, such as satellite imagery and regional wildfire maps.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully pulls in data from third-party systems.

nodes.task_description: Correlate the air quality drop with a large wildfire burning in a neighboring state, identifying smoke drift as the root cause.

expected_outcome.value: Agent correctly diagnoses the cause of the air quality issue.
